evidence.description: Both Soroush and his audiences were assaulted by Ansar-e Hezbollah vigilantes in the mid-1990s, leaving him 'bruised, battered and often in tattered clothes'

evidence.source_title: Refworld — Iran: Soroush seminar at Amir Kabir University
evidence.description: Ansar-e Hezbollah disrupted Soroush's seminars at Tehran University and Isfahan, preventing him from entering Amir Kabir University

editorial_notes: Repeated physical assaults on Soroush and his lecture audiences in the mid-1990s.
